delta = 0.00078336834580104735350894224823047104771319532723428

1/(9*phi**6)              = 0.00619201000009346826258948056388  delta/this = 0.12651277142466217344  relerr(this vs delta) = 6.904e+00

1/360                     = 0.00277777777777777777777777777778  delta/this = 0.28201260448837704726  relerr(this vs delta) = 2.546e+00

1/(4*pi*phi**6)           = 0.00443470049635195248321425877251  delta/this = 0.17664515257466817967  relerr(this vs delta) = 4.661e+00
